DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SAN ANTONIO SHOE INC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT BARCHARD SHALL SERVE ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, ALL WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF ORDER. SANCTIONS OF $560.00 ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT BARCHARD, PAYABLE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF ORDER, PROVIDED THAT THE COURT WILL REVISIT THE AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS IN THE EVENT COUNSEL TO PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO ATTEND AN IN-PERSON HEARING ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT CONSISTENT WITH THE FOREGOING BY EMAIL TO JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Motion For Terminating Sanction For Disobeying Court Order To Provide Discovery, For Attorneys' Fees And For Alternative Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN ANTONIO SHOE INC.'S Motion For Terminating Sanction For Disobeying Court Order To Provide Discovery, For Attorneys' Fees And For Alternative Sanctions.

Plaintiff San Antonio Shoe, Inc.'s motion for terminating sanctions for disobeying court order to provide discovery is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. The proof of service for the motion papers has an incorrect address for defendant James Barchard.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN ANTONIO SHOE INC's Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions.

Plaintiff's motion to have facts and documents deemed admitted and for sanctions is unopposed and is granted. The truth of each matter specified in the Requests for Admissions served on Defendant James Barchard on December 15, 2017 will be deemed established. Sanctions of $560.00 are awarded in favor of plaintiff and against defendant Barchard, payable within 15 days of the date of order, provided that the Court will revisit the amount of sanctions in the event counsel to plaintiff is required to attend an in-person hearing on this motion. Plaintiff's counsel shall submit a proposed order in Word format consistent with the foregoing by email to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN ANTONIO SHOE INC's Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions.

Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to interrogatories and response to demand for inspection of documents and for sanctions is unopposed and is granted. Defendant Barchard shall serve answers to interrogatories, response to demand for inspection of documents and responsive documents, all without objection, within 15 days of the date of order. Sanctions of $560.00 are awarded in favor of plaintiff and against defendant Barchard, payable within 15 days of the date of order, provided that the Court will revisit the amount of sanctions in the event counsel to plaintiff is required to attend an in-person hearing on this motion. Plaintiff's counsel shall submit a proposed order in Word format consistent with the foregoing by email to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
